step_rationale: Early biomarker of plaque inflammation and endothelial stress preceding rupture.
mechanism: miRNA marking inflammatory activation and vascular instability in unstable coronary lesions.

references.title: ABHD4-Regulating RNA Panel: Novel Biomarkers in Acute Coronary Syndrome Diagnosis.
Circulating miR-221-3p as a novel marker for early prediction of acute myocardial infarction.
